TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng "kamu nu Ing, Pulled rickshaw" u icelang nu tademaw a saculilan, tungus singayangayay a kazizengan. tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, u duba' ku icelang, tengtenganay taneng tatusay ku muenengay a tademaw nu tusaay bihel a kazizeng. šļļŚäõŤĽä(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Pulled rickshaw) . nilaculan tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng angangan i 19 se-ci tu zikuz katukuh 20 se-ci tu saayaway, u cayay henay kacakat a zidayan ku kazizeng, i Ya-cow a kasa kanatalan tuse a kakitizaan angangan sa u saculilan. 20 se-ci tu zikuz u saculil haymaw sa mapakutay tu sanlinsya ancay utubay, ayza angangan sa u sapicukaymas i piidangan. ayzaay tu a mihcaan, misabalucu' tu sapaini tu pakay mitengtengan tu kazizeng a tademaw, katuud ku kanatal caay tu paicelang a micukaymas tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. Han a zidayan u tademaw ku mitengtengay tu kazizeng, pangangan han tu tengtenganay cuzuhenay a kazizeng. Cin-kang-si a cudad "Kung-ce-win-ta‚Äßnu wawaan" pahece tu nikulitan tahekal zikuz micuzuh tu tademaw ku mitengteng tu kazizeng. izaw ku masazumaay i panaway nu subayu malepacaw, paeneng tu balakiay tu a babalaki tu tusaay a bihel, caay kautang tuhkal i Han a ziday, mahiniay u "an-ce-pu-lun". tademaw ku mitengteng tu kazizeng saayaway i 1869 a mihcaan i Zipun masanga'. misanga'ay yadah ku mahicahicaay a kamu, katuud ku milayapay tu mahiniay a kamu sa ci Yang-cye-cyen "Izumi Yosuke", izaw ku kamu aca nu Ameylik a sankiwse ci Cyaw-na-sen¬∑S-ke-pi "Jonathan Scobie" hakay misamukinay Ameylika ci Ay-pow-te¬∑Tu-al-man "Albert Tolman" ku nisanga'ay. u saayaway u uzip ku micukaymasay i Heng-pin a zazan, nika kalamkam sa matiyak macukaymas nu itiza, i pinaay tu a mihcaan mala nu Zipun nu tabakiay a tu-se nu kahenulan a saculilan. (Izumi Yosuke), ¬∑śĖĮÁßĎśĮĒ(Jonathan Scobie)śąĖśėĮÁĺéŚúčťźĶŚĆ†ŤČĺšľĮÁČĻ¬∑śĚúÁąĺśõľ(Albert Tolman)Áôľśėé. . Cong-kow šł≠Śúč 1873 a mihcaan cacay a tademawan ci Mey-na "Menard" misiwbayay nu Ba-kow namakay Zipun katukuh i San-hay, mitanam pacumud tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng saetan ku Cong-kow, sululan nu Baw-kow nu pacaliway a kung-tung-ci. kung-tung-ci palasic tu paya nu kazizang a miala tu sapasata a mikuwan. 1874 a mihcaan mi-la tadenga'aytu patizeng tu kusi, katukuh kalepunan tu nu mihcaan, cacay a bataan tu ku nipatizeng tu kusi i Sang-hay, macapi tu malebut ku kazizeng nu misiwbayay tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. zikuz hayamaw satu madangdang i Sang-hay, katukuh 1914 a mihcaan hawsa, uyza kapulungan nu pacaliway tu kazizeng izaw ku 9178 ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. 1874 . caay ku i Sang-hayay dada', tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng kalamkam asatu makatukuh i kasatuse nu Cong-kow. 1906 a mihcaa, pacumud i tu-se tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, singanganay tu misulitay tu kungku a cudad Law-se a nisulitan tu "low-tow-syang-ce", amitudung misulit tu nikauzip nu Pey-cin nu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. . misumad śĒĻŤČĮ napacumud i Cowng-kow zikuz tu cacay a bataan a mihcaan, tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng yadah tu ku nikasumad tu nalimaan, pasu kilangay a bihel ayaw han misumad tu nu ngumuay a bihel, zazikuzay suman han tu pabalienay ku bihel, macudus ku tanektek muculil, cunus han tu sapicangzay atu baniay a enengan, alihalay ku mikacaway a labang, cunusen padingking ku kazizeng akapah muculil i sandeb. i saayaway nu Sang-hay u siwbananay ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng a kusi angangan saayaway nu tauay a kanatal ku patizengan, micakay tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, pasayza i pacaliway cen-bu pangangan amicakay tu paya nu kazizeng, zikuz pacaliwen aca tu Cong-koway nu teban nu misiwbanay, pacalien aca pabeli tu mitengtengy tu kazizeng a tademaw mala u sapisiwbay, katukah 20 se-ci malingatu, haymaw tahkal i Cow-kow nu misiwbayay a kusi mababekel mipangangan. itawya tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng nisanga'an a aca zayhan macakat ku nalimaan haymaw satu maselep, micakay ku kusi tu cacay tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, cacay a bulad ku nipacaliw manukas tu ku nakalisiwan, namahiza u sietanay tu a kawaw ku mahiniay. mitengtengay tu kazizeng a tademaw, šļļŚäõŤĽäŚ§ę mitengtengay tu kazizeng a tademaw mangelu' ku nikauzip, i 1930 a ziday, mikacaw tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng u aca cacay ing-li ku piala tu kalisiw caay kakatukuh tu 20 a saculil, kikayasuyan tu i tawyaay nu pacaliway tu kazizeng, pakadimata' amin ku binawlan, cunus tu nu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng palalecad tu nu kazizeng hawsa, kapah micumud tu likecuay a zazan, namahiza mala u angangan tu a saculilan nu tademaw amin. nika mitengtengay tu kazizeng a tademaw mangelu', nika zikuz nikelul tu nicaliwan a kazizeng a kalisiw, caay kayadah ku kalisiw. u nipiasip, i 1930 a ziday, Sang-hay hakay izaw ku 80000 ku tademaw nu mitengtengay tu kazizeng a sakauzip, hatu u malimaday nu pakuyucay a tademaw. zikuz macakat ku sindinsya, nayi' tu ku mibabekelay tu singayangayay a kazizeng. 1956 a mihcaan, Sang-hay sazikuzay nu singayangayay a kazizeng mapatayza i Pow-u-kwan mala u aazihan tu. 1887 a mihcaan saayaway nu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng namakayzaay i Sang-hay anipacumud i Taywan. pahezek tu ku sakatusa nu tabaakiay a kalepacaw nu kitakit, tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng malingatu mapakutay tu sindingsya. Cong-hwa-min-kow saculil a hulic napala u mahaymaway nu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, Cong-hwa-min-kow zazan nu saculil a pyaw-ce naizaw ku paya tu la'cus micumud ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, nika kilul tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng maliayaw tu mahamin mapaales mipaculil, Cong-hwa-min-kow zazan saculil a pyaw-ce mapalasawad tu la'cus micumud ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. 1887 . "Cong-hwa-min-kow zazan saculil a sakalihalay a likec saka 116 tusil a niketunan, kasakuwan a kuwan, tuse cen-bu "u niketunan tu kasa kuwan atu kakuwanan" sayhan macakat tu ku saculilan nu kitizaan, sakay cacanan tu mahaymaway a kazizseng hinisa a palesen tu, pasakamu tu sin-ce-yen pakatineng miketun la'cus tu paculil." zuma a kitizaan izaw henay ku niliwan tu sanlinsya u sapiidang, patinaku i Ci-cin atu lu-kang. Syang-kangay a tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng i 1874 a mihca 1 a bulad cacay kya misiwbayay a tademaw namakay Zipun micakay, pinaay tu a mihcaan mala u dangdangay tu a saculilan, saaca i 1883 a mihcaan malingatu mikuwan tu pacaliw a kawaw tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, angangan pakayniay paya nu kazizeng atu paculilay a wayway "lu-cin a zikuc, bukes atu la'cus tanayu' ku kanus" a nikuwan. tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng i Syang-kang u kayadah i 1896 a mihcaan 585 ku kazizeng macunus katukuh tu 1920 a ziday macaliwsay tu 3,000 ku kazizeng. nika kilul tu 1924 a mihcaan tu nipacumud tu pacaliw tu kazizeng "te-s", atu nu uzipay a kazizeng malingatu tu madangdang, alimicakay ku katitaan, cudus tu nu basu atu katukuh dingkiay a kazizeng, malingatu tu makelul ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč "kamu nu iŇč, pur~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd ri ¶ksńßaw" u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, tuŇčus siŇčajaŇčajaj a kaziz…ôŇčan. t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, u duba Ē~ ° ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, t…ôŇčt…ôŇčanaj tan…ôŇč tatusaj ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw nu tusaaj bińß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč. ***(**:pur~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd ri ¶ksńßaw) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč aŇčaŇčan i ** s…ô- ¶i tu zikuz katukuńß ** s…ô- ¶i tu saajawaj, u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj ka ¶akat a zidajan ku kaziz…ôŇč, i ja- ¶ow a kasa kanatar~…ĺan tus…ô a kakitizaan aŇčaŇčan sa u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. ** s…ô- ¶i tu zikuz u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßajmaw sa mapakutaj tu sanr~…ĺinsja an ¶aj utubaj, ajza aŇčaŇčan sa u sapi ¶ukajmas i piidaŇčan. ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan, misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu sapaini tu pakaj mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčan tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw, katuud ku kanatar~…ĺ ¶aaj tu pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a mi ¶ukajmas tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. ńßan a zidajan u tad…ômaw ku mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇčanaj ¶uzuńß…ônaj a kaziz…ôŇč. ¶in-kaŇč-si a ¶udad "kuŇč- ¶…ô-win-ta*nu wawaan" pańß…ô ¶…ô tu nikur~…ĺitan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ zikuz mi ¶uzuńß tu tad…ômaw ku mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč. izaw ku masazumaaj i panawaj nu subaju mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, pa…ôn…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a babar~…ĺaki tu tusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ, ¶aaj kautaŇč tuńßkar~…ĺ i ńßan a zidaj, mańßiniaj u "an- ¶…ô-pu-r~…ĺun". tad…ômaw ku mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč saajawaj i **** a mińß ¶aan i zipun masaŇča Ē~ °. misaŇča Ē~ °aj jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a kamu, katuud ku mir~…ĺajapaj tu mańßiniaj a kamu sa ¶i jaŇč- ¶j…ô- ¶j…ôn "izumi josuk…ô", izaw ku kamu a ¶a nu am…ôr~…ĺik a sankiws…ô ¶i ¶jaw-na-s…ôn*s-k…ô-pi "*onatńßan s ¶obi…ô" ńßakaj misamukinaj am…ôr~…ĺika ¶i aj-pow-t…ô*tu-ar~…ĺ-man "ar~…ĺb…ôrt tor~…ĺman" ku nisaŇča Ē~ °aj. u saajawaj u uzip ku mi ¶ukajmasaj i ńß…ôŇč-pin a zazan, nika kar~…ĺamkam sa matijak ma ¶ukajmas nu itiza, i pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa nu zipun nu tabakiaj a tu-s…ô nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. (izumi josuk…ô), ****(*onatńßan s ¶obi…ô)*************(ar~…ĺb…ôrt tor~…ĺman)**. . ¶oŇč-kow ** **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômawan ¶i m…ô-na "m…ônard" misiwbajaj nu ba-kow namakaj zipun katukuńß i san-ńßaj, mitanam pa ¶umud tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč sa…ôtan ku ¶oŇč-kow, sur~…ĺur~…ĺan nu baw-kow nu pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj a kuŇč-tuŇč- ¶i. kuŇč-tuŇč- ¶i par~…ĺasi ¶ tu paja nu kazizaŇč a miar~…ĺa tu sapasata a mikuwan. **** a mińß ¶aan mi-r~…ĺa tad…ôŇča Ē~ °ajtu patiz…ôŇč tu kusi, katukuńß kar~…ĺ…ôpunan tu nu mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶aj a bataan tu ku nipatiz…ôŇč tu kusi i saŇč-ńßaj, ma ¶api tu mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku kaziz…ôŇč nu misiwbajaj tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. zikuz ńßajamaw satu madaŇčdaŇč i saŇč-ńßaj, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, ujza kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kaziz…ôŇč izaw ku **** ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. **** . ¶aaj ku i saŇč-ńßajaj dada Ē~ °, t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč kar~…ĺamkam asatu makatukuńß i kasatus…ô nu ¶oŇč-kow. **** a mińß ¶aa, pa ¶umud i tu-s…ô tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, siŇčaŇčanaj tu misur~…ĺitaj tu kuŇčku a ¶udad r~…ĺaw-s…ô a nisur~…ĺitan tu "r~…ĺow-tow-sjaŇč- ¶…ô", amituduŇč misur~…ĺit tu nikauzip nu p…ô- ¶in nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. . misumad ** napa ¶umud i ¶owŇč-kow zikuz tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a mińß ¶aan, t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč jadańß tu ku nikasumad tu nar~…ĺimaan, pasu kir~…ĺaŇčaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ ajaw ńßan misumad tu nu Ňčumuaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ, zazikuzaj suman ńßan tu pabar~…ĺi…ônaj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ, ma ¶udus ku tan…ôkt…ôk mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶unus ńßan tu sapi ¶aŇčzaj atu baniaj a …ôn…ôŇčan, ar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku mika ¶awaj a r~…ĺabaŇč, ¶unus…ôn padiŇčkiŇč ku kaziz…ôŇč akapańß mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i sand…ôb. i saajawaj nu saŇč-ńßaj u siwbananaj ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč a kusi aŇčaŇčan saajawaj nu tauaj a kanatar~…ĺ ku patiz…ôŇčan, mi ¶akaj tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, pasajza i pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ¶…ôn-bu paŇčaŇčan ami ¶akaj tu paja nu kaziz…ôŇč, zikuz pa ¶ar~…ĺiw…ôn a ¶a tu ¶oŇč-kowaj nu t…ôban nu misiwbanaj, pa ¶ar~…ĺi…ôn a ¶a pab…ôr~…ĺi tu mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčj tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺa u sapisiwbaj, katukańß ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ńßajmaw tańßkar~…ĺ i ¶ow-kow nu misiwbajaj a kusi mabab…ôk…ôr~…ĺ mipaŇčaŇčan. itawja t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč nisaŇča Ē~ °an a a ¶a zajńßan ma ¶akat ku nar~…ĺimaan ńßajmaw satu mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp, mi ¶akaj ku kusi tu ¶a ¶aj t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad ku nipa ¶ar~…ĺiw manukas tu ku nakar~…ĺisiwan, namańßiza u si…ôtanaj tu a kawaw ku mańßiniaj. mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw, **** mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku nikauzip, i **** a zidaj, mika ¶aw tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč u a ¶a ¶a ¶aj iŇč-r~…ĺi ku piar~…ĺa tu kar~…ĺisiw ¶aaj kakatukuńß tu ** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, kikajasujan tu i tawjaaj nu pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, pakadimata Ē~ ° amin ku binawr~…ĺan, ¶unus tu nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nu kaziz…ôŇč ńßawsa, kapańß mi ¶umud tu r~…ĺik…ô ¶uaj a zazan, namańßiza mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan tu a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu tad…ômaw amin. nika mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, nika zikuz nik…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ni ¶ar~…ĺiwan a kaziz…ôŇč a kar~…ĺisiw, ¶aaj kajadańß ku kar~…ĺisiw. u nipiasip, i **** a zidaj, saŇč-ńßaj ńßakaj izaw ku ***** ku tad…ômaw nu mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a sakauzip, ńßatu u mar~…ĺimadaj nu pakuju ¶aj a tad…ômaw. zikuz ma ¶akat ku sindinsja, naji Ē~ ° tu ku mibab…ôk…ôr~…ĺaj tu siŇčajaŇčajaj a kaziz…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan, saŇč-ńßaj sazikuzaj nu siŇčajaŇčajaj a kaziz…ôŇč mapatajza i pow-u-kwan mar~…ĺa u aazińßan tu. **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč namakajzaaj i saŇč-ńßaj anipa ¶umud i tajwan. pańß…ôz…ôk tu ku sakatusa nu tabaakiaj a kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nu kitakit, t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu mapakutaj tu sindiŇčsja. ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ napar~…ĺa u mańßajmawaj nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow zazan nu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a pjaw- ¶…ô naizaw ku paja tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us mi ¶umud ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč mar~…ĺiajaw tu mańßamin mapaar~…ĺ…ôs mipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow zazan sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a pjaw- ¶…ô mapar~…ĺasawad tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us mi ¶umud ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. **** . " ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow zazan sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺik…ô ¶ saka *** tusir~…ĺ a nik…ôtunan, kasakuwan a kuwan, tus…ô ¶…ôn-bu "u nik…ôtunan tu kasa kuwan atu kakuwanan" sajńßan ma ¶akat tu ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu kitizaan, sakaj ¶a ¶anan tu mańßajmawaj a kazizs…ôŇč ńßinisa a par~…ĺ…ôs…ôn tu, pasakamu tu sin- ¶…ô-j…ôn pakatin…ôŇč mik…ôtun r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ." zuma a kitizaan izaw ńß…ônaj ku nir~…ĺiwan tu sanr~…ĺinsja u sapiidaŇč, patinaku i ¶i- ¶in atu r~…ĺu-kaŇč. sjaŇč-kaŇčaj a t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj kja misiwbajaj a tad…ômaw namakaj zipun mi ¶akaj, pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u daŇčdaŇčaj tu a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, saa ¶a i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikuwan tu pa ¶ar~…ĺiw a kawaw tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, aŇčaŇčan pakajniaj paja nu kaziz…ôŇč atu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a wajwaj "r~…ĺu- ¶in a ziku ¶, buk…ôs atu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tanaju Ē~ ° ku kanus" a nikuwan. t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč i sjaŇč-kaŇč u kajadańß i **** a mińß ¶aan *** ku kaziz…ôŇč ma ¶unus katukuńß tu **** a zidaj ma ¶ar~…ĺiwsaj tu *,*** ku kaziz…ôŇč. nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu nipa ¶umud tu pa ¶ar~…ĺiw tu kaziz…ôŇč "t…ô-s", atu nu uzipaj a kaziz…ôŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu madaŇčdaŇč, ar~…ĺimi ¶akaj ku katitaan, ¶udus tu nu basu atu katukuńß diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng "kamu nu Ing, Pulled rickshaw" u icelang nu tademaw a saculilan, tungus singayangayay a kazizengan. tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, u duba' ku icelang, tengtenganay taneng tatusay ku muenengay a tademaw nu tusaay bihel a kazizeng. šļļŚäõŤĽä(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Pulled rickshaw) . nilaculan tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng angangan i 19 se-ci tu zikuz katukuh 20 se-ci tu saayaway, u cayay henay kacakat a zidayan ku kazizeng, i Ya-cow a kasa kanatalan tuse a kakitizaan angangan sa u saculilan. 20 se-ci tu zikuz u saculil haymaw sa mapakutay tu sanlinsya ancay utubay, ayza angangan sa u sapicukaymas i piidangan. ayzaay tu a mihcaan, misabalucu' tu sapaini tu pakay mitengtengan tu kazizeng a tademaw, katuud ku kanatal caay tu paicelang a micukaymas tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. Han a zidayan u tademaw ku mitengtengay tu kazizeng, pangangan han tu tengtenganay cuzuhenay a kazizeng. Cin-kang-si a cudad "Kung-ce-win-ta‚Äßnu wawaan" pahece tu nikulitan tahekal zikuz micuzuh tu tademaw ku mitengteng tu kazizeng. izaw ku masazumaay i panaway nu subayu malepacaw, paeneng tu balakiay tu a babalaki tu tusaay a bihel, caay kautang tuhkal i Han a ziday, mahiniay u "an-ce-pu-lun". tademaw ku mitengteng tu kazizeng saayaway i 1869 a mihcaan i Zipun masanga'. misanga'ay yadah ku mahicahicaay a kamu, katuud ku milayapay tu mahiniay a kamu sa ci Yang-cye-cyen "Izumi Yosuke", izaw ku kamu aca nu Ameylik a sankiwse ci Cyaw-na-sen¬∑S-ke-pi "Jonathan Scobie" hakay misamukinay Ameylika ci Ay-pow-te¬∑Tu-al-man "Albert Tolman" ku nisanga'ay. u saayaway u uzip ku micukaymasay i Heng-pin a zazan, nika kalamkam sa matiyak macukaymas nu itiza, i pinaay tu a mihcaan mala nu Zipun nu tabakiay a tu-se nu kahenulan a saculilan. (Izumi Yosuke), ¬∑śĖĮÁßĎśĮĒ(Jonathan Scobie)śąĖśėĮÁĺéŚúčťźĶŚĆ†ŤČĺšľĮÁČĻ¬∑śĚúÁąĺśõľ(Albert Tolman)Áôľśėé. . Cong-kow šł≠Śúč 1873 a mihcaan cacay a tademawan ci Mey-na "Menard" misiwbayay nu Ba-kow namakay Zipun katukuh i San-hay, mitanam pacumud tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng saetan ku Cong-kow, sululan nu Baw-kow nu pacaliway a kung-tung-ci. kung-tung-ci palasic tu paya nu kazizang a miala tu sapasata a mikuwan. 1874 a mihcaan mi-la tadenga'aytu patizeng tu kusi, katukuh kalepunan tu nu mihcaan, cacay a bataan tu ku nipatizeng tu kusi i Sang-hay, macapi tu malebut ku kazizeng nu misiwbayay tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. zikuz hayamaw satu madangdang i Sang-hay, katukuh 1914 a mihcaan hawsa, uyza kapulungan nu pacaliway tu kazizeng izaw ku 9178 ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. 1874 . caay ku i Sang-hayay dada', tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng kalamkam asatu makatukuh i kasatuse nu Cong-kow. 1906 a mihcaa, pacumud i tu-se tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, singanganay tu misulitay tu kungku a cudad Law-se a nisulitan tu "low-tow-syang-ce", amitudung misulit tu nikauzip nu Pey-cin nu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. . misumad śĒĻŤČĮ napacumud i Cowng-kow zikuz tu cacay a bataan a mihcaan, tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng yadah tu ku nikasumad tu nalimaan, pasu kilangay a bihel ayaw han misumad tu nu ngumuay a bihel, zazikuzay suman han tu pabalienay ku bihel, macudus ku tanektek muculil, cunus han tu sapicangzay atu baniay a enengan, alihalay ku mikacaway a labang, cunusen padingking ku kazizeng akapah muculil i sandeb. i saayaway nu Sang-hay u siwbananay ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng a kusi angangan saayaway nu tauay a kanatal ku patizengan, micakay tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, pasayza i pacaliway cen-bu pangangan amicakay tu paya nu kazizeng, zikuz pacaliwen aca tu Cong-koway nu teban nu misiwbanay, pacalien aca pabeli tu mitengtengy tu kazizeng a tademaw mala u sapisiwbay, katukah 20 se-ci malingatu, haymaw tahkal i Cow-kow nu misiwbayay a kusi mababekel mipangangan. itawya tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng nisanga'an a aca zayhan macakat ku nalimaan haymaw satu maselep, micakay ku kusi tu cacay tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, cacay a bulad ku nipacaliw manukas tu ku nakalisiwan, namahiza u sietanay tu a kawaw ku mahiniay. mitengtengay tu kazizeng a tademaw, šļļŚäõŤĽäŚ§ę mitengtengay tu kazizeng a tademaw mangelu' ku nikauzip, i 1930 a ziday, mikacaw tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng u aca cacay ing-li ku piala tu kalisiw caay kakatukuh tu 20 a saculil, kikayasuyan tu i tawyaay nu pacaliway tu kazizeng, pakadimata' amin ku binawlan, cunus tu nu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng palalecad tu nu kazizeng hawsa, kapah micumud tu likecuay a zazan, namahiza mala u angangan tu a saculilan nu tademaw amin. nika mitengtengay tu kazizeng a tademaw mangelu', nika zikuz nikelul tu nicaliwan a kazizeng a kalisiw, caay kayadah ku kalisiw. u nipiasip, i 1930 a ziday, Sang-hay hakay izaw ku 80000 ku tademaw nu mitengtengay tu kazizeng a sakauzip, hatu u malimaday nu pakuyucay a tademaw. zikuz macakat ku sindinsya, nayi' tu ku mibabekelay tu singayangayay a kazizeng. 1956 a mihcaan, Sang-hay sazikuzay nu singayangayay a kazizeng mapatayza i Pow-u-kwan mala u aazihan tu. 1887 a mihcaan saayaway nu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng namakayzaay i Sang-hay anipacumud i Taywan. pahezek tu ku sakatusa nu tabaakiay a kalepacaw nu kitakit, tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng malingatu mapakutay tu sindingsya. Cong-hwa-min-kow saculil a hulic napala u mahaymaway nu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, Cong-hwa-min-kow zazan nu saculil a pyaw-ce naizaw ku paya tu la'cus micumud ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, nika kilul tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng maliayaw tu mahamin mapaales mipaculil, Cong-hwa-min-kow zazan saculil a pyaw-ce mapalasawad tu la'cus micumud ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. 1887 . "Cong-hwa-min-kow zazan saculil a sakalihalay a likec saka 116 tusil a niketunan, kasakuwan a kuwan, tuse cen-bu "u niketunan tu kasa kuwan atu kakuwanan" sayhan macakat tu ku saculilan nu kitizaan, sakay cacanan tu mahaymaway a kazizseng hinisa a palesen tu, pasakamu tu sin-ce-yen pakatineng miketun la'cus tu paculil." zuma a kitizaan izaw henay ku niliwan tu sanlinsya u sapiidang, patinaku i Ci-cin atu lu-kang. Syang-kangay a tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng i 1874 a mihca 1 a bulad cacay kya misiwbayay a tademaw namakay Zipun micakay, pinaay tu a mihcaan mala u dangdangay tu a saculilan, saaca i 1883 a mihcaan malingatu mikuwan tu pacaliw a kawaw tu tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng, angangan pakayniay paya nu kazizeng atu paculilay a wayway "lu-cin a zikuc, bukes atu la'cus tanayu' ku kanus" a nikuwan. tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng i Syang-kang u kayadah i 1896 a mihcaan 585 ku kazizeng macunus katukuh tu 1920 a ziday macaliwsay tu 3,000 ku kazizeng. nika kilul tu 1924 a mihcaan tu nipacumud tu pacaliw tu kazizeng "te-s", atu nu uzipay a kazizeng malingatu tu madangdang, alimicakay ku katitaan, cudus tu nu basu atu katukuh dingkiay a kazizeng, malingatu tu makelul ku tengtengenay nu tademaw a kazizeng. . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč "kamu nu iŇč, pur~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd ri ¶ksńßaw" u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, tuŇčus siŇčajaŇčajaj a kaziz…ôŇčan. t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, u duba Ē~ ° ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, t…ôŇčt…ôŇčanaj tan…ôŇč tatusaj ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw nu tusaaj bińß…ôr~…ĺ a kaziz…ôŇč. ***(**:pur~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd ri ¶ksńßaw) . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč aŇčaŇčan i ** s…ô- ¶i tu zikuz katukuńß ** s…ô- ¶i tu saajawaj, u ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj ka ¶akat a zidajan ku kaziz…ôŇč, i ja- ¶ow a kasa kanatar~…ĺan tus…ô a kakitizaan aŇčaŇčan sa u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. ** s…ô- ¶i tu zikuz u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßajmaw sa mapakutaj tu sanr~…ĺinsja an ¶aj utubaj, ajza aŇčaŇčan sa u sapi ¶ukajmas i piidaŇčan. ajzaaj tu a mińß ¶aan, misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu sapaini tu pakaj mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčan tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw, katuud ku kanatar~…ĺ ¶aaj tu pai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč a mi ¶ukajmas tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. ńßan a zidajan u tad…ômaw ku mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇčanaj ¶uzuńß…ônaj a kaziz…ôŇč. ¶in-kaŇč-si a ¶udad "kuŇč- ¶…ô-win-ta*nu wawaan" pańß…ô ¶…ô tu nikur~…ĺitan tańß…ôkar~…ĺ zikuz mi ¶uzuńß tu tad…ômaw ku mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč. izaw ku masazumaaj i panawaj nu subaju mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, pa…ôn…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a babar~…ĺaki tu tusaaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ, ¶aaj kautaŇč tuńßkar~…ĺ i ńßan a zidaj, mańßiniaj u "an- ¶…ô-pu-r~…ĺun". tad…ômaw ku mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč saajawaj i **** a mińß ¶aan i zipun masaŇča Ē~ °. misaŇča Ē~ °aj jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a kamu, katuud ku mir~…ĺajapaj tu mańßiniaj a kamu sa ¶i jaŇč- ¶j…ô- ¶j…ôn "izumi josuk…ô", izaw ku kamu a ¶a nu am…ôr~…ĺik a sankiws…ô ¶i ¶jaw-na-s…ôn*s-k…ô-pi "*onatńßan s ¶obi…ô" ńßakaj misamukinaj am…ôr~…ĺika ¶i aj-pow-t…ô*tu-ar~…ĺ-man "ar~…ĺb…ôrt tor~…ĺman" ku nisaŇča Ē~ °aj. u saajawaj u uzip ku mi ¶ukajmasaj i ńß…ôŇč-pin a zazan, nika kar~…ĺamkam sa matijak ma ¶ukajmas nu itiza, i pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa nu zipun nu tabakiaj a tu-s…ô nu kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan. (izumi josuk…ô), ****(*onatńßan s ¶obi…ô)*************(ar~…ĺb…ôrt tor~…ĺman)**. . ¶oŇč-kow ** **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômawan ¶i m…ô-na "m…ônard" misiwbajaj nu ba-kow namakaj zipun katukuńß i san-ńßaj, mitanam pa ¶umud tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč sa…ôtan ku ¶oŇč-kow, sur~…ĺur~…ĺan nu baw-kow nu pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj a kuŇč-tuŇč- ¶i. kuŇč-tuŇč- ¶i par~…ĺasi ¶ tu paja nu kazizaŇč a miar~…ĺa tu sapasata a mikuwan. **** a mińß ¶aan mi-r~…ĺa tad…ôŇča Ē~ °ajtu patiz…ôŇč tu kusi, katukuńß kar~…ĺ…ôpunan tu nu mińß ¶aan, ¶a ¶aj a bataan tu ku nipatiz…ôŇč tu kusi i saŇč-ńßaj, ma ¶api tu mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku kaziz…ôŇč nu misiwbajaj tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. zikuz ńßajamaw satu madaŇčdaŇč i saŇč-ńßaj, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, ujza kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kaziz…ôŇč izaw ku **** ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. **** . ¶aaj ku i saŇč-ńßajaj dada Ē~ °, t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč kar~…ĺamkam asatu makatukuńß i kasatus…ô nu ¶oŇč-kow. **** a mińß ¶aa, pa ¶umud i tu-s…ô tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, siŇčaŇčanaj tu misur~…ĺitaj tu kuŇčku a ¶udad r~…ĺaw-s…ô a nisur~…ĺitan tu "r~…ĺow-tow-sjaŇč- ¶…ô", amituduŇč misur~…ĺit tu nikauzip nu p…ô- ¶in nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. . misumad ** napa ¶umud i ¶owŇč-kow zikuz tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan a mińß ¶aan, t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč jadańß tu ku nikasumad tu nar~…ĺimaan, pasu kir~…ĺaŇčaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ ajaw ńßan misumad tu nu Ňčumuaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ, zazikuzaj suman ńßan tu pabar~…ĺi…ônaj ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ, ma ¶udus ku tan…ôkt…ôk mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶unus ńßan tu sapi ¶aŇčzaj atu baniaj a …ôn…ôŇčan, ar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku mika ¶awaj a r~…ĺabaŇč, ¶unus…ôn padiŇčkiŇč ku kaziz…ôŇč akapańß mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i sand…ôb. i saajawaj nu saŇč-ńßaj u siwbananaj ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč a kusi aŇčaŇčan saajawaj nu tauaj a kanatar~…ĺ ku patiz…ôŇčan, mi ¶akaj tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, pasajza i pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ¶…ôn-bu paŇčaŇčan ami ¶akaj tu paja nu kaziz…ôŇč, zikuz pa ¶ar~…ĺiw…ôn a ¶a tu ¶oŇč-kowaj nu t…ôban nu misiwbanaj, pa ¶ar~…ĺi…ôn a ¶a pab…ôr~…ĺi tu mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčj tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺa u sapisiwbaj, katukańß ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ńßajmaw tańßkar~…ĺ i ¶ow-kow nu misiwbajaj a kusi mabab…ôk…ôr~…ĺ mipaŇčaŇčan. itawja t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč nisaŇča Ē~ °an a a ¶a zajńßan ma ¶akat ku nar~…ĺimaan ńßajmaw satu mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp, mi ¶akaj ku kusi tu ¶a ¶aj t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad ku nipa ¶ar~…ĺiw manukas tu ku nakar~…ĺisiwan, namańßiza u si…ôtanaj tu a kawaw ku mańßiniaj. mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw, **** mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku nikauzip, i **** a zidaj, mika ¶aw tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč u a ¶a ¶a ¶aj iŇč-r~…ĺi ku piar~…ĺa tu kar~…ĺisiw ¶aaj kakatukuńß tu ** a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, kikajasujan tu i tawjaaj nu pa ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kaziz…ôŇč, pakadimata Ē~ ° amin ku binawr~…ĺan, ¶unus tu nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu nu kaziz…ôŇč ńßawsa, kapańß mi ¶umud tu r~…ĺik…ô ¶uaj a zazan, namańßiza mar~…ĺa u aŇčaŇčan tu a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu tad…ômaw amin. nika mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a tad…ômaw maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, nika zikuz nik…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ni ¶ar~…ĺiwan a kaziz…ôŇč a kar~…ĺisiw, ¶aaj kajadańß ku kar~…ĺisiw. u nipiasip, i **** a zidaj, saŇč-ńßaj ńßakaj izaw ku ***** ku tad…ômaw nu mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč a sakauzip, ńßatu u mar~…ĺimadaj nu pakuju ¶aj a tad…ômaw. zikuz ma ¶akat ku sindinsja, naji Ē~ ° tu ku mibab…ôk…ôr~…ĺaj tu siŇčajaŇčajaj a kaziz…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan, saŇč-ńßaj sazikuzaj nu siŇčajaŇčajaj a kaziz…ôŇč mapatajza i pow-u-kwan mar~…ĺa u aazińßan tu. **** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč namakajzaaj i saŇč-ńßaj anipa ¶umud i tajwan. pańß…ôz…ôk tu ku sakatusa nu tabaakiaj a kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw nu kitakit, t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu mapakutaj tu sindiŇčsja. ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a ńßur~…ĺi ¶ napar~…ĺa u mańßajmawaj nu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow zazan nu sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a pjaw- ¶…ô naizaw ku paja tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us mi ¶umud ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč mar~…ĺiajaw tu mańßamin mapaar~…ĺ…ôs mipa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow zazan sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a pjaw- ¶…ô mapar~…ĺasawad tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us mi ¶umud ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. **** . " ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow zazan sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ a sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺik…ô ¶ saka *** tusir~…ĺ a nik…ôtunan, kasakuwan a kuwan, tus…ô ¶…ôn-bu "u nik…ôtunan tu kasa kuwan atu kakuwanan" sajńßan ma ¶akat tu ku sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan nu kitizaan, sakaj ¶a ¶anan tu mańßajmawaj a kazizs…ôŇč ńßinisa a par~…ĺ…ôs…ôn tu, pasakamu tu sin- ¶…ô-j…ôn pakatin…ôŇč mik…ôtun r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ." zuma a kitizaan izaw ńß…ônaj ku nir~…ĺiwan tu sanr~…ĺinsja u sapiidaŇč, patinaku i ¶i- ¶in atu r~…ĺu-kaŇč. sjaŇč-kaŇčaj a t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj kja misiwbajaj a tad…ômaw namakaj zipun mi ¶akaj, pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u daŇčdaŇčaj tu a sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, saa ¶a i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikuwan tu pa ¶ar~…ĺiw a kawaw tu t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč, aŇčaŇčan pakajniaj paja nu kaziz…ôŇč atu pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a wajwaj "r~…ĺu- ¶in a ziku ¶, buk…ôs atu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tanaju Ē~ ° ku kanus" a nikuwan. t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč i sjaŇč-kaŇč u kajadańß i **** a mińß ¶aan *** ku kaziz…ôŇč ma ¶unus katukuńß tu **** a zidaj ma ¶ar~…ĺiwsaj tu *,*** ku kaziz…ôŇč. nika kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu nipa ¶umud tu pa ¶ar~…ĺiw tu kaziz…ôŇč "t…ô-s", atu nu uzipaj a kaziz…ôŇč mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu madaŇčdaŇč, ar~…ĺimi ¶akaj ku katitaan, ¶udus tu nu basu atu katukuńß diŇčkiaj a kaziz…ôŇč, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ ku t…ôŇčt…ôŇč…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a kaziz…ôŇč. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
